presets.name: multicanalita
presets.description: Config equivalente a send-monitor-tpp-messages. Compilare i valori vuoti in base all'ambiente target.

athena.query:
WITH interesting_timelines AS (
  SELECT
    timelineElementId,
    date_trunc( 'hour', at_timezone(from_iso8601_timestamp(timestamp), 'Europe/Rome')) as ora_invio
  FROM
    pn_timelines_json_view
  WHERE
    timelineElementId LIKE '%TPP%'
    AND CONCAT(p_year, p_month, p_day, p_hour) >= '{{startYear}}{{startMonth}}{{startDay}}{{startHour}}'
    AND CONCAT(p_year, p_month, p_day, p_hour) <= '{{endYear}}{{endMonth}}{{endDay}}{{endHour}}'
)
SELECT
  ora_invio,
  count(*) as notifiche_tpp
FROM
  interesting_timelines
GROUP BY
  ora_invio
ORDER BY
  ora_invio

rules: name=tpp-messages-threshold;field=notifiche_tpp;operator=>;value=100;aggregation=any-row;severity=warning;message=Rilevate fasce orarie con notifiche TPP sopra soglia

athena.query:
WITH date_context AS (
  SELECT current_date - INTERVAL '1' DAY AS base_date
),
trackings AS (
  SELECT
    t.*,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY t.trackingId
      ORDER BY t.updatedAt DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM "pn_paper_trackings_json_view" t
  CROSS JOIN date_context dc
  WHERE p_year = format_datetime((SELECT base_date FROM date_context), 'yyyy')
    AND p_month = format_datetime((SELECT base_date FROM date_context), 'MM')
    AND p_day = format_datetime((SELECT base_date FROM date_context), 'dd')
),
errors AS (
  SELECT e.*
  FROM "pn_paper_trackings_errors_json_view" e
  CROSS JOIN date_context dc
  WHERE p_year = format_datetime((SELECT base_date FROM date_context), 'yyyy')
    AND p_month = format_datetime((SELECT base_date FROM date_context), 'MM')
    AND p_day = format_datetime((SELECT base_date FROM date_context), 'dd')
),
latest_trackings AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM trackings
  WHERE rn = 1
),
errors_with_trackings AS (
  SELECT
    latest_trackings.*,
    errors.category AS errorCategory,
    errors.productType AS errorProductType
  FROM errors
  LEFT JOIN latest_trackings
    ON latest_trackings.trackingId = errors.trackingId
  WHERE errors.type = 'ERROR'
)
SELECT
  errorProductType AS prodotto,
  errorCategory,
  unifiedDeliveryDriver AS recapitista,
  COUNT(*) AS numero_errori
FROM errors_with_trackings
GROUP BY errorProductType, errorCategory, unifiedDeliveryDriver
ORDER BY numero_errori DESC;
